mapper.select: SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info::text AS user_info FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info::text AS user_info FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false FOR UPDATE
SELECT user_id , user_nm FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id IN #{uid}

sql.where:
COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
AND (user_id ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR user_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(user_info ->> 'email_id', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT user_id , user_nm , user_info ->> 'corporation_cd' AS corporation_cd , user_info ->> 'grade_cd' AS grade_cd , user_info ->> 'user_type' AS user_type , user_info ->> 'user_status' AS user_status , user_info ->> 'auth_group' AS auth_group , user_info ->> 'mobile_no' AS mobile_no , user_info ->> 'email_id' AS email_id , user_info ->> 'privacy_access' AS privacy_access , user_info ->> 'second_auth_yn' AS second_auth_yn , user_info ->> 'access_ip_limit' AS access_ip_limit , user_info ->> 'access_ip' AS access_ip , (user_info ->> 'password_fail_cnt')::int AS password_fail_cnt , user_info ->> 'last_login_dtm' AS last_login_dtm , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM om_user_m
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE om_user_m SET user_info = #{userInfo}::jsonb , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS userId , u.user_nm AS userNm , u.user_info ->> 'email_id' AS emailId , u.user_info ->> 'grade_cd' AS gradeCd , u.user_info ->> 'auth_group' AS authGroup , ag.auth_group_nm AS authGroupNm , u.user_info ->> 'user_status' AS userStatus , u.user_info ->> 'last_login_dtm' AS lastLoginDtm , to_char(u.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_user_m u LEFT JOIN om_auth_group_m ag ON ag.auth_group_cd = (u.user_info ->> 'auth_group') AND COALESCE(ag.is_deleted, false) = false
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId , u.user_nm AS userNm , u.user_info ->> 'email_id' AS emailId , u.user_info ->> 'grade_cd' AS gradeCd , u.user_info ->> 'auth_group' AS authGroup , ag.auth_group_nm AS authGroupNm , u.user_info ->> 'user_status' AS userStatus , u.user_info ->> 'last_login_dtm' AS lastLoginDtm , to_char(u.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_user_m u LEFT JOIN om_auth_group_m ag ON ag.auth_group_cd = (u.user_info ->> 'auth_group') AND COALESCE(ag.is_deleted, false) = false
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS userId , u.user_nm AS userNm , u.user_info ->> 'email_id' AS emailId , u.user_info ->> 'grade_cd' AS gradeCd , u.user_info ->> 'auth_group' AS authGroup , u.user_info ->> 'user_status' AS userStatus , u.user_info ->> 'mobile_no' AS mobileNo , u.user_info ->> 'corporation_cd' AS corporationCd , to_char(u.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , to_char(u.updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt , u.created_by AS createdBy , u.updated_by AS updatedBy FROM om_user_m u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(u.is_deleted, false) = false
